[2018-04-25 18:36] foxclear: I'm wondering : Am I the only one to find Thermite Core too strong and terrible to play/play against ? It's drifted from the previous cool (albeit weak) concept of getting seldom abuses to a core strategy of not attacking during many turns, stacking the pixies while depriving opponent from absorb at all, yet increasing the damage count. And you can't really counterplay it, as unlike with units like Frost Brooders or Endotherm Kit, the damage here is real.
I've thought of the possibility of giving Pixies a lifespan, just like with Frost Brooders, in order to force the player to go offensive at a point. Not sure what lifespan to use, though, maybe 4. What do you think ?
[2018-04-25 18:38] supergreyman (Greyman): You're not the only one. A lot of players including top players also think it's too strong.
[2018-04-25 18:39] supergreyman (Greyman): It's like playing a match-2 attack puzzle game. 😛
[2018-04-25 18:42] supergreyman (Greyman): But Elyot is aware of it, so hopefully we'll see some good changes.

:Click: , consume :Drone: , gain 2 :Gold: :Blue:

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: I see what you did there

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: for 3B this is a pretty expensive drone

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: so you better have a good use for the click ability

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: otherwise this seems pretty much useless

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: and the click ability seems pretty much focussed exclusively on cheating big blue stuff out

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: I guess there is a place for it in sets with big blue stuff

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: Can also help you sneak out extra walls and it is a 2 health doomed drone so probably not the worst use of a B if you have one floating around.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: hm actually it may just be good as a vigilant soak I guess

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: Yeah Vigilant doomed drone with option value seems easier to work some value out of.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: yeah I missed the vigilant part and without that this seemed really meh

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: but as a ~2.5B 2 health soak this seems alright

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: It might also make steelsplitter a bit more appealing.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: pay 4 and a drone for a steelsplitter seems like a nice deal I guess

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: also finally a tool to transition my economy into bp ebb turbines 😄

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: Its no steelforge steelsplitter as you're still supply limited but makes it a lot easier to work in a couple.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: I mean you are not really supply limited

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: If you were ALREADY going to rely on steelsplitters for attack (maybe its a big odin game?), it doesn't help you get additional attackers the same way steelforge does though.

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: yeah but this helps you cheat out odin so you don't have to have blastforges sitting around that do nothing but buying splitters 😉

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: The click is sorta like buying a B for an earlier turn's 1E?

messages.author: darkeisbein
messages.content: I don't think that is a good way to think about selling of drones

messages.author: liadahlia
messages.content: yeah, it's usually a lot better than that

messages.author: liadahlia
messages.content: i'm afraid this unit will fall into the ferritin trap again

messages.author: liadahlia
messages.content: where you think you need the extra blue but you really don't

messages.author: liadahlia
messages.content: i guess the difference on this one is you can just click it when you actually need it

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: A bit of a tax to keep one floating around forever but not awful if you consider that it'll produce 4 + 2B over lifespan+1 click; which happens to be all but the energy for D+scrapper

messages.author: kaelii
messages.content: So it can sorta float around as a 'do nothing -- soak 2 on last lifespan' and make a new one.

messages.author: liadahlia
messages.content: i don't think it's so bad though. You're paying an extra blue compared to ebb but you can sell drones for about 2/3rd of a gold more (assuming you can use the blue)
